title: russelia furfuracea
intro: Russelia furfuracea, also known as Mexican Gold or Coral Plant, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing stress, improving mood, and providing antioxidant protection. Russelia furfuracea is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
